about.title: About Chic Happens
about.story: Founded in 2015, Chic Happens is a brand that believes fashion should be bold, playful, and as dynamic as life itself. Our mission? To make every outfit feel like catching lightning in a bottle — unforgettable and electrifying.
about.mission: We’re committed to sustainability, creativity, and turning everyday moments into runways. Fashion isn’t just clothing; it’s a statement, a mood, and a story waiting to be told.
lookbook.title: Our Lookbook
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.text: Have questions, suggestions, or want to collaborate? Don’t be a stranger — we love hearing from you!
